---
title: "Fig 4m - WT line profile, actin-focus variant"
output: html_notebook
params:
  genotype: "WT"
  final_plot_channel: "Ch3"
  pdf_name: "Act_profile.pdf"
  write_csvs: TRUE
---

<!--
================================================================================
  Wrapper for Fig 4m, WT genotype, "actin focus" variant.
================================================================================
  Includes the canonical template at:
      ../../templates/fig04m_line_profile_coloc.Rmd

  Parameters supplied above:
    - genotype = "WT"                 -> Ch2 (actin) NA cutoff = 30
                                          CSV prefix = "WT"
    - final_plot_channel = "Ch3"       -> final ribbon plot is df_summary3
                                          (NMIIb profile)
    - pdf_name = "Act_profile.pdf"     -> ggsave filename for the panel.
                                          (Legacy filename retained for
                                           byte-equivalent reproduction.)
    - write_csvs = TRUE                -> also emit WT_actin.csv + WT_NMIIb.csv
                                          as Source Data tables.

  Original 248-line monolithic wrapper extracted into a template on
  2026-05-12.
-->

```{r child = "../../templates/fig04m_line_profile_coloc.Rmd"}
```
